statement.headerDoc:
STEP 989 — Minimal Overlap Problem M(n) for n = 1..5 (Erdős 1955)
  ==================================================================

  Source: formal-conjectures/ErdosProblems/36.lean
    (original: `theorem M_one : M 1 = 1 := by sorry` ... M_five)

  Definitions (standard Erdős 1955):
    Overlap(A, B, k) = |{(a, b) : a ∈ A, b ∈ B, a - b = k}|
    MaxOverlap(A, B) = max over all k of Overlap(A, B, k)
    M(n) = min over partitions (A, B) of {1, ..., 2n} with |A| = |B| = n
           of MaxOverlap(A, B)

  Known values:
    M(1) = 1, M(2) = 1, M(3) = 2, M(4) = 2, M(5) = 3

  This STEP imple
